------MultipartBoundary--bGnXnry3eub8c7HonGauA7SqSEtwOfQu0P9L0iaVuN---- Content-Type: text/css Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable Content-Location: cid:css-22ab1905-2f3a-4ae4-8924-00522531ec7a@mhtml.blink @charset "utf-8"; @font-face { font-family: Pretendard; src: url("https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh= /orioncactus/pretendard@v1.3.9/dist/web/static/woff2/Pretendard-Regular.wof= f2") format("woff2"); font-weight: 400; } @font-face { font-family: Pretendard; src: url("https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh= /orioncactus/pretendard@v1.3.9/dist/web/static/woff2/Pretendard-Medium.woff= 2") format("woff2"); font-weight: 500; } @font-face { font-family: Pretendard; src: url("https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh= /orioncactus/pretendard@v1.3.9/dist/web/static/woff2/Pretendard-Bold.woff2"= ) format("woff2"); font-weight: 700; } :root { --bg: #faf9f6; --bg-alt: #f1efe9; --ink: #23221e; --ink-soft: #6b6a= 63; --olive: #47562f; --olive-deep: #313d1f; --tomato: #c1442d; --line: #dd= d9cf; --white: #ffffff; } * { margin: 0px; padding: 0px; box-sizing: border-box; } html { scroll-behavior: smooth; } body { font-family: Pretendard, sans-serif; background: var(--bg); color: v= ar(--ink); line-height: 1.6; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; } h1, h2, h3 { font-family: "Noto Serif KR", serif; font-weight: 700; letter-= spacing: -0.01em; } a { color: inherit; text-decoration: none; } .wrap { max-width: 1120px; margin: 0px auto; padding: 0px 32px; } header { position: sticky; top: 0px; z-index: 100; background: rgba(250, 24= 9, 246, 0.9); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--l= ine); } nav.wrap { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-betwe= en; height: 72px; } .logo { font-family: "Noto Serif KR", serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 2= 0px; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .logo span { color: var(--olive); } .navlinks { display: flex; gap: 36px; font-size: 14.5px; font-weight: 500; = } .navlinks a { opacity: 0.75; transition: opacity 0.2s; } .navlinks a:hover { opacity: 1; } .nav-cta { background: var(--olive); color: var(--white); padding: 10px 20p= x; border-radius: 100px; font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 500; } .hero { padding: 96px 0px 72px; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.1fr= 0.9fr; gap: 64px; align-items: center; } .eyebrow { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: = 13px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--olive); letter-spacing: 0.04em; margin= -bottom: 20px; } .eyebrow::before { content: ""; width: 18px; height: 1px; background: var(-= -olive); } .hero h1 { font-size: 46px; line-height: 1.22; margin-bottom: 22px; color: = var(--olive-deep); } .hero p.lead { font-size: 16.5px; color: var(--ink-soft); max-width: 440px;= margin-bottom: 32px; } .hero-ctas { display: flex; gap: 12px; } .btn-primary { background: var(--tomato); color: var(--white); padding: 14p= x 26px; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 500; font-size: 15px; display: inl= ine-block; } .btn-ghost { border: 1px solid var(--line); padding: 14px 26px; border-radi= us: 8px; font-weight: 500; font-size: 15px; display: inline-block; } .bento { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.3fr 1fr; grid-template-row= s: 1fr 0.7fr; gap: 10px; height: 380px; } .bento .cell { border-radius: 16px; position: relative; overflow: hidden; d= isplay: flex; align-items: flex-end; padding: 16px; } .bento .cell img { position: absolute; inset: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100= %; object-fit: cover; } .bento .cell::after { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0px; backgrou= nd: linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 40%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.55) 100%); } .bento .cell span { color: var(--white); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500;= opacity: 0.95; position: relative; z-index: 2; } .bento .c1 { grid-row: 1 / 3; background: var(--olive-deep); } .bento .c2 { background: var(--tomato); } .bento .c3 { background: rgb(169, 114, 31); } .section { padding: 88px 0px; } .section-head { max-width: 560px; margin-bottom: 48px; } .section-head .eyebrow { margin-bottom: 14px; } .section-head h2 { font-size: 32px; color: var(--olive-deep); margin-bottom= : 12px; } .section-head p { color: var(--ink-soft); font-size: 15.5px; } .alt-bg { background: var(--bg-alt); } .menu-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); grid-aut= o-rows: 140px; gap: 12px; } .menu-item { border-radius: 14px; padding: 18px; display: flex; flex-direct= ion: column; justify-content: flex-end; color: var(--white); position: rela= tive; overflow: hidden; background-size: cover; background-position: center= center; } .menu-item::before { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0px; backgroun= d: linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05) 30%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.65) 100%); } .menu-item .price, .menu-item h4, .menu-item p { position: relative; z-inde= x: 2; } .menu-item .price { position: absolute; top: 14px; right: 16px; z-index: 2;= font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.22); = padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 100px; } .menu-item h4 { font-family: Pretendard; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700;= margin-bottom: 4px; } .menu-item p { font-size: 12.5px; opacity: 0.9; } .m-1 { grid-area: span 2 / span 2; background-image: url("https://lh3.googl= eusercontent.com/ODvDjpcaY9DxaWyndv5cHnHPO6s4SkIXuNj36Z1MDEws1BZyOSt0lF7d_Q= chtxkiF_C5mxvSbIWYjyn6jn3oX2acRRit6iNy0FiGgp00nCu0eeFKqqOn=3Dw700-h500-n");= } .m-2 { grid-column: span 2; background-image: url("https://lh3.googleuserco= ntent.com/1MYJWqlrZlDMRJoMZy-Wi3kbFBHtu6E9m_Mxu1iQU5LkCWaWk9z820tTN-_WNnzvT= 2VvriwrPZcheDyJ_vqPckG5sJfudCicvBJTThu-Es0Qw8mvsUmiG5I=3Dw700-h500-n"); } .m-3 { grid-column: span 2; background-image: url("https://lh3.googleuserco= ntent.com/RBGfy9qIosWOAc4uV88bU-yPGi2wffjD_iW9aEvi5o1xklTH4wwlsp_54OiL8VfK1= 7rBDnhOO79BIdj4j2sc0aLyVIO3u1bO1hW435FyVfmshCg5uHF9GQ=3Dw700-h500-n"); } .m-4 { grid-area: span 2 / span 2; background-image: url("https://lh3.googl= eusercontent.com/GuDciFgys_VdLGwx2gEm99gX6Cyu3WFIISi1BmQTFpHK1HFPcaaCJHlT41= qvhFXwv1SsEQGjb-Ksau0u0DQ_fMhgCxwPf9M-SdDKDEohaTVCw6mrEobF=3Dw700-h500-n");= } .m-5 { grid-column: span 2; background-image: url("https://lh3.googleuserco= ntent.com/Pyl44SsLr8Hjs3CrKKGTLnm0MsVTAJxY905ASZpuT7Ehh5a-8SpQWjhIE2PuMZXcA= AMXkh7YBNswbNBcilh8VusanZWdunAhMus_ALjTthjbsHmt22RyWnI=3Dw700-h500-n"); } .story { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 0.9fr 1.1fr; gap: 64px; alig= n-items: center; } .story-visual { background: var(--olive-deep); border-radius: 20px; height:= 340px; padding: 36px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-conte= nt: space-between; } .story-visual .yr { color: var(--white); font-family: "Noto Serif KR"; font= -size: 44px; } .story-visual .yr-label { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6); font-size: 13px;= } .stat-row { display: flex; gap: 40px; } .stat b { font-family: "Noto Serif KR"; font-size: 28px; color: var(--white= ); display: block; } .stat span { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.55); font-size: 12.5px; } .story h2 { font-size: 30px; color: var(--olive-deep); margin-bottom: 18px;= } .story p { color: var(--ink-soft); font-size: 15.5px; margin-bottom: 16px; = max-width: 480px; } .loc-list { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 1px;= background: var(--line); border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 14p= x; overflow: hidden; } .loc-item { background: var(--bg); padding: 26px 22px; } .loc-item h4 { font-size: 15.5px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 8px; } .loc-item p { font-size: 13px; color: var(--ink-soft); } .loc-item .tel { color: var(--olive); font-weight: 500; margin-top: 6px; di= splay: block; } .cta-section { background: var(--olive-deep); border-radius: 24px; padding:= 64px 56px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: cen= ter; gap: 40px; margin: 0px 32px; } .cta-section h2 { color: var(--white); font-size: 28px; max-width: 380px; } .cta-section p { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6); font-size: 14.5px; margin= -top: 10px; } footer { padding: 56px 0px 40px; } .foot-grid { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: fl= ex-start; padding-bottom: 32px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line); margi= n-bottom: 24px; } .foot-grid .logo { margin-bottom: 10px; } .foot-grid p { color: var(--ink-soft); font-size: 13.5px; } .foot-bottom { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 12= .5px; color: var(--ink-soft); } @media (max-width: 860px) { .hero { grid-template-columns: 1fr; padding-top: 48px; } .hero h1 { font-size: 34px; } .bento { height: 260px; } .navlinks { display: none; } .story { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .menu-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } .m-1, .m-4 { grid-column: span 2; } .loc-list { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .cta-section { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; margin: 0= px 20px; padding: 40px 28px; } .wrap { padding: 0px 20px; } } ------MultipartBoundary--bGnXnry3eub8c7HonGauA7SqSEtwOfQu0P9L0iaVuN------
